title: sterculia monticola
intro: Sterculia monticola, also known as the Mountain Corkwood or Mountain Sterculia, is a plant species belonging to the Sterculiaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Sterculia monticola include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against certain infections. Traditionally, the plant's bark, leaves, and roots are used in herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
